## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Tested in Electron desktop app (`npm run electron:dev`)
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or sensitive data committed
- [ ] No `.env`, `.pfx`, `.pem`, or license material included
